mapper.insert: insert into goods(merchant_id, category_id, pic, title, price, is_show, create_time, update_time, status, des, click_times) value (#{merchantId}, #{categoryId}, #{pic}, #{title}, #{price}, #{isShow}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{status}, #{des}, #{clickTimes})
mapper.select:
select * from goods where id IN
#{id}
select * from goods where title like concat('%', #{name}, '%')

select g.id, g.merchant_id, g.category_id, g.pic, g.title, cast(t.min_price as char) as price, g.is_show, g.create_time, g.update_time, g.status, g.des, g.click_times from (select s.goods_id as goods_id, min(s.price) as min_price from sku s inner join goods g on g.id = s.goods_id
g.is_show = 1 and g.status = 1 and s.status = 1
and g.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and s.price >= #{minPrice}
and s.price <= #{maxPrice}
and JSON_CONTAINS(s.sku_attrs, cast(#{attr} as json))
group by s.goods_id) t inner join goods g on g.id = t.goods_id
order by t.min_price asc
order by t.min_price desc
order by g.update_time desc
select sku_id, goods_id, price, market_price, cost_price, stock, lock_stock, sku_attrs, status, sale_count, created_at, updated_at from sku where goods_id = #{goodsId} order by sku_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into sku(goods_id, price, market_price, cost_price, stock, lock_stock, sku_attrs, status, sale_count) values (#{goodsId}, #{price}, #{marketPrice}, #{costPrice}, #{stock}, #{lockStock}, cast(#{skuAttrs} as json), #{status}, #{saleCount})
mapper.update: update sku set stock = stock + #{quantity}, updated_at = current_timestamp where sku_id = #{skuId} and status = 1
mapper.select: select sku_id, goods_id, price, market_price, cost_price, stock, lock_stock, sku_attrs, status, sale_count, created_at, updated_at from sku where sku_id = #{skuId} limit 1
